name: gpt-image2-skill
description: Codex skill and dependency-free Node.js CLI for GPT Image 2 prompt templates and OpenAI-compatible image APIs.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/gpt-image2.mjs sizes list && node scripts/gpt-image2.mjs templates list && node scripts/gpt-image2.mjs generate --template encyclopedia-card --var topic=茶叶 --dry-run
